microsoft_ft: **Scaled Azure's end-to-end deployment validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, architecting a rack-level drill program **delivered in 4 months** with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a reusable reference architecture for continuous production validation.

Directed **14 cross-org production deployments** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, navigating complex security, compliance, and networking constraints end-to-end.

Built an **internal AI agent** for drill planning and restructured ambiguous, multi-stakeholder workflows into structured execution playbooks, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing deployment capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Converted one-off enterprise integration patterns into **repeatable deployment playbooks** and templates across Kubernetes and cloud-native environments, enabling the team to onboard new strategic customers faster and scale high-impact solutions across accounts.
microsoft_2023: **Drove production adoption of AI-powered code generation** tooling by leading hands-on demos and integration sessions with 14 Azure service teams, translating ambiguous customer workflows into structured deployment guides that saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Surfaced critical feature gaps by conducting **11+ discovery interviews** with enterprise technical stakeholders, directly influencing the product roadmap to prioritize intent-based YAML generation — a capability now embedded in core developer workflows.

microsoft_2022: **Generated $3M in accelerated revenue** and launched cloud regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, securing buy-in across 140+ teams with competing constraints and ambiguous requirements.

Led end-to-end discovery across 20+ enterprise service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a phased roadmap to automate critical deployment paths — turning a one-off finding into a scalable, repeatable reduction strategy.

Engineered a **Power BI observability dashboard** tracking operational toil signals across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact interventions, and make data-driven infrastructure investment decisions at scale.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero production downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot deployment by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and resolving integration failures before they reached the production environment.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, triaging and resolving **40+ high-priority integration tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain deployment velocity across a complex distributed robotics infrastructure.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a reusable deployment pattern for future production rollouts.
pro_painters: **Increased job bookings by 26%** by redesigning the end-to-end customer engagement lifecycle — building a new CRM workflow that managed scoping, proposal generation, and invoicing for 200+ monthly engagements with greater speed and accuracy.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the company website and Google Business profile to improve discoverability and qualified lead flow.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and closing margin leaks that improved leadership pricing models and informed more accurate cost estimation for future customer engagements.
